016package org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing;
017
018import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
019import org.bitcoinj.script.Script;
020import org.bitcoinj.script.ScriptBuilder;
021import org.bitcoinj.script.ScriptOpCodes;
022
023/**
024 * Raw, immutable data for an OP_RETURN transaction output
025 */
026public class TransactionOutputOpReturn implements TransactionOutputData {
027    private final byte[] opReturnData;
028
029    public TransactionOutputOpReturn(byte[] opReturnData) {
030        this.opReturnData = opReturnData;
031    }
032
033    @Override
034    public Coin amount() {
035        return Coin.ofSat(0);
036    }
037
038    @Override
039    public Script scriptPubKey() {
040        return new ScriptBuilder()
041                .op(ScriptOpCodes.OP_RETURN)
042                .data(opReturnData)
043                .build();
044    }
045
046    public byte[] opReturnData() {
047        return opReturnData;
048    }
049
050}
